generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the input current from the controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on motor side measuring angular position of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on gearbox side measuring angular position of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

// C4: Data transmitted via MQTT
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorPositionData, GearboxPositionData
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionData, GearboxPositionData
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedVelocityData
]

// C10: Data instances derived from transmitted data
instance CurrentTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, SimulinkEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor side encoder angles"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, SimulinkEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxPositionTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox side encoder angles"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, SimulinkEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
]

instance TorqueTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of derived torque"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
]

instance VelocityTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of derived angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
]

instance AccelerationTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of derived angular acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAccelerationData
]

// C10: Models
instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gear‑box mechanism associated with the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance SystemSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML‑based structural model of the complete first axis system (motor + gearbox + linkage) with embedded Simulink calculation blocks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker enabling real‑time streaming of sensor data to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, TorqueVelocityComparisonService
]

instance SimulinkEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution engine performing data‑calculation and continuous identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionParameterExtractionService
]

instance AASRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell repository providing semantic linking of data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live dashboard visualising measured vs simulated torques, velocities, and accelerations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeComparisonInsight, WearTrendsInsight, ControllerTuningGuideInsight, PathRepeatabilityInsight, PositionAccuracyInsight, MaintenancePlanningInsight
]

instance TorqueVelocityComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing time‑series of measured and simulated torque and velocity for debugging and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeComparisonInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and updating of advanced friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance FrictionParameterExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extraction of refined friction parameters for controller optimisation"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing real‑time differences between measured and simulated torques and velocities"
]

instance WearTrendsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying wear trends in motor and gearbox components"
]

instance ControllerTuningGuideInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing guidance for tuning controller parameters based on identified friction"
]

instance PathRepeatabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight demonstrating path repeatability and positional accuracy of machining operations"
]

instance PositionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight quantifying positional accuracy achieved by the first rotary axis"
]

instance MaintenancePlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualising friction losses for maintenance planning"
]

instance UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that updated friction parameters have been identified and applied"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically update friction model parameters within the simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TuneControllersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to tune controller gains based on guidance from controller tuning insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C18: Environment and components
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin environment encapsulating sensors, data streams, models and services for the MABI MAX 100 first rotary axis"
    base:contains
        MotorCurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder,
        MotorCurrentData, MotorPositionData, GearboxPositionData,
        DerivedTorqueData, DerivedVelocityData, DerivedAccelerationData,
        CurrentTimeSeriesData, MotorPositionTimeSeriesData,
        GearboxPositionTimeSeriesData, TorqueTimeSeriesData,
        VelocityTimeSeriesData, AccelerationTimeSeriesData,
        MotorSimulinkModel, GearboxSimulinkModel, SystemSimulinkModel,
        MQTTBrokerEnabler, SimulinkEngineEnabler, AASRepositoryEnabler,
        RealTimeVisualizationService, TorqueVelocityComparisonService,
        FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionParameterExtractionService,
        RealTimeComparisonInsight, WearTrendsInsight, ControllerTuningGuideInsight,
        PathRepeatabilityInsight, PositionAccuracyInsight, MaintenancePlanningInsight,
        UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction,
        TuneControllersAction
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time data acquisition and simulation; PQ with sensor sampling rates and simulation update loops, but exact rates not specified"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of AAS, simulation models, data ingestion via MQTT, processing component (simulation models), dashboard for visualization, and data traces linking PT measurements to virtual models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated (runtime) stage; DT created to support operation and monitor friction during use"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point to its source and processing component; comparison of measured versus simulated signals; use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box models; continuous identification mitigates wear and operating condition changes; validation through residual analysis between measured and simulated torques."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT‑based data streaming; AAS for metadata and model linkage; all communications over local network"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The twin implements SysML (ISO/IEC 8373) for structural and functional models and employs Asset Administration Shells (ISO/IEC 23247) for data integration, adhering to the digital shadow reference model and related standards."
]
